name: P2 Solar, Inc
summary: P2 Solar, Inc. develops solar photovoltaic (PV) power and mini-hydro projects. It operates a solar PV rooftop project in Canada; and two mini-hydro power projects in India. The company was formerly known as Natco International Inc. and changed its name to P2 Solar, Inc. in March 2009. P2 Solar, Inc. was founded in 1990 and is based in Surrey, Canada.
